introSection: Mini Costor was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Fantazy Land in Alexandria, Egypt.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride features a simple layout with a single helix. It is painted orange with silver supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Mine cart style train with lap-bar restraints.

fullText:
Mini Costor was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Fantazy Land in Alexandria, Egypt.

The ride features a simple layout with a single helix. It is painted orange with silver supports.

Mine cart style train with lap-bar restraints.
